## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.13.2

### 🔔 Blueprint
- Keeps the camera event blueprint default notification on a selected Home Assistant Companion app device.
- Clarifies that `camera.play_stream` should not be used as a recording playback action.
- Keeps the Motion event recording URL in the notification message and mobile notification tap target.
- Shows when an X-Sense Motion event did not include a direct recording URL.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for the blueprint guidance and recording URL notification message.
- Confirms the camera stream implementation files remain unchanged for this prerelease.
